belier.intro: The Moon has crossed out of airy Libra and now sits deep in Scorpio at 11 degrees, in your eighth house, a notably more intense and probing register than the last two days offered. The First Quarter phase, with the light already at 60 percent, asks you to act on something rather than merely observe it, and this house pushes that action toward whatever you share, owe, or merge with another person. The Sun completes its final day in Cancer before tomorrow's shift into Leo, closing a chapter of quiet feeling just as this Scorpio Moon opens a more searching one.
belier.love: Intimacy today wants depth over lightness, and a partner may raise a subject you have both been circling without naming. Let the Scorpio Moon's probing quality work for you; a direct question asked with real care can resolve more than a week of careful avoidance.
belier.work: A shared resource, contract, or joint financial matter reaches a decision point under this First Quarter tension. Your Martian instinct to act is well supported now, but aim it at the specific obstacle rather than the general frustration surrounding it.
belier.energy: Your fire meets water today and the result is not a dimming but a deepening, a heat that works beneath the surface rather than on top of it. Channel this into one focused push rather than scattering it across several fronts.
belier.intuition: The eighth house Scorpio Moon sharpens your read on what is left unsaid in a close bond. Trust the discomfort that signals something real is finally surfacing.
belier.mantra: I act with courage on what has been quietly building.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon's move from Libra into Scorpio lands directly in your seventh house at 11 degrees, turning the spotlight of this First Quarter phase onto partnership itself, not just the people in it but the shape and fairness of the bond. Venus rules you and asks for balance, yet Scorpio's water runs deeper and more searching than your usual register, less about harmony and more about honesty. The Cancer Sun spends its last day in a sign that has quietly supported you, and tomorrow's shift into Leo will change the emotional weather again.
taureau.love: A relationship conversation carries unusual weight today, the kind that moves past pleasantries into what is actually working and what is not. This is not a day for smoothing things over; it is a day for finding out what is real beneath the surface.
taureau.work: Negotiations and one-on-one professional dynamics benefit from directness rather than diplomacy today. State your position clearly and let the First Quarter's active energy carry the conversation to an actual resolution.
taureau.energy: Your usual steadiness meets Scorpio's undertow today, and the combination can feel unfamiliar, a pull toward intensity you might normally avoid. Let it move through you rather than resisting it outright.
taureau.intuition: Your instinct about a partner's true feelings or intentions is unusually accurate right now. If something feels withheld, it likely is, and naming it gently opens more than it closes.
taureau.mantra: I seek honesty over comfort in what matters most.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Moon enters Scorpio at 11 degrees in your sixth house, a marked shift from the airier territory of recent days into something far more visceral, touching your daily habits, your body, and your work with unusual weight. The First Quarter square asks for a decision, not endless analysis, and this house makes that decision practical: what in your routine is genuinely serving you and what has quietly become a burden. Mercury retrograde in Cancer, moving through your second house, keeps money and self-worth tangled in the same conversation as your everyday choices.
gemeaux.love: Small daily gestures matter more than grand statements today. A partner may need to see steady, practical care rather than clever words, and Mercury retrograde rewards you for listening twice before speaking once.
gemeaux.work: A work habit or health routine that has been quietly failing you asks for honest reassessment now. The Scorpio Moon does not want a surface fix; it wants you to address the actual root of the inefficiency.
gemeaux.energy: Your usual mental restlessness settles into something more focused and bodily today. Physical movement, not just thinking things through, helps you process what this Moon is stirring.
gemeaux.intuition: Your body is giving you real information about what is and is not working in your daily life. A recurring physical signal deserves attention rather than dismissal today.
gemeaux.mantra: I trust what my body already knows to be true.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon moves into Scorpio at 11 degrees within your fifth house, a considerably more intense placement than the Libra Moon of recent days, and it arrives on the very last day of your Sun's residence in your own sign before tomorrow's shift into Leo. This First Quarter phase, with the light growing toward 60 percent, wants creative or romantic decisiveness rather than more contemplation. Mercury retrograde continues through your first house, still asking you to revisit how you present your own needs before this solar chapter closes.
cancer.love: Romance and creative self-expression carry real emotional stakes today, more so than the lighter recent days suggested. A feeling you have been playing with rather than committing to may ask to become real, or to be released honestly.
cancer.work: A creative project reaches a decision point today, and the Scorpio Moon favors depth of commitment over breadth of options. Choose the direction that feels most emotionally true, even if it is the harder path.
cancer.energy: Your native water deepens further under this Scorpio Moon, a homecoming of sorts even as it intensifies your usual sensitivity. Give yourself permission to feel things fully rather than managing them from a distance.
cancer.intuition: Creative and romantic intuitions run unusually deep and specific today. An impulse that feels almost too personal to act on is likely the truest guide you have available.
cancer.mantra: I commit fully to what stirs my heart.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon settles into Scorpio at 11 degrees in your fourth house, a striking shift from the lighter Libra placement of previous days into something that reaches straight into home, family, and emotional foundations. This First Quarter phase demands action rather than reflection, and here that means addressing something at the root of your domestic life rather than around its edges. The Cancer Sun makes its final pass through your twelfth house today, with tomorrow bringing your own sign back into solar focus, a quiet closing before your seasonal turn.
lion.love: A domestic or family matter shared with a partner needs direct attention today rather than gentle avoidance. The Scorpio Moon rewards honesty about what home actually feels like right now, even if the truth is uncomfortable.
lion.work: If you work from home or manage responsibilities that blend the domestic and professional, today asks you to resolve a tension between the two rather than let it simmer further.
lion.energy: Your fire burns lower and more inward today, better suited to private intensity than public display. Use this energy to address something at home rather than performing for an audience.
lion.intuition: Your sense of what is really happening beneath the surface of your family dynamics is sharp today. A pattern you have sensed but not named is ready to be acknowledged.
lion.mantra: I face what lies beneath my own foundations.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon enters Scorpio at 11 degrees in your third house, replacing the airier Libra energy of recent days with something more probing and less easily deflected by clever words. This First Quarter square wants a real decision about a communication or a piece of information you have been sitting on, not another round of analysis. Mercury, your own ruler, moves retrograde through Cancer in your eleventh house, complicating group conversations and asking you to reconsider what you have already said to friends or collaborators.
vierge.love: A conversation with someone close carries more emotional undertow than usual today. Say the truer, harder thing rather than the easier, safer one; Scorpio's Moon rewards depth over diplomacy in matters of the heart.
vierge.work: Written communication, negotiations, or a piece of unfinished correspondence demand real resolution today rather than further postponement. Mercury retrograde asks you to revise before you send, but revise toward honesty, not just polish.
vierge.energy: Your mental energy takes on a heavier, more searching quality today, less quick and more penetrating. Use it to dig into one issue thoroughly rather than skimming several.
vierge.intuition: Your instinct about what someone is really trying to tell you, beneath their actual words, is unusually accurate today. Trust the subtext over the surface text.
vierge.mantra: I speak the truer thing beneath the easier one.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Moon leaves your own sign and enters Scorpio at 11 degrees in your second house, a notable shift in emotional register from the familiar Libra territory into something more possessive and searching around money, resources, and self-worth. The First Quarter phase asks for a concrete decision here, not endless weighing of options, which can feel unnatural for your usually deliberative nature. The Cancer Sun completes its final day in your tenth house today, closing a quiet chapter in your public life just as tomorrow turns the light toward Leo and your eleventh house.
balance.love: A conversation about shared resources, or what you each bring to a relationship, benefits from directness today rather than your usual instinct to smooth things over. Naming an imbalance clearly is more loving than avoiding it.
balance.work: A financial decision or a question of your own valuation in a professional context reaches a point where further deliberation only delays the inevitable. Choose, and trust that Venus will help you find grace within the decision.
balance.energy: Your usual desire for balance meets Scorpio's insistence on depth today, and the friction between the two is productive if you let it be. Do not mistake discomfort for wrongness.
balance.intuition: Your sense of your own true worth, separate from what others assign you, is unusually clear today. A quiet certainty about your value deserves more weight than outside opinion.
balance.mantra: I know my worth without needing it confirmed.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Moon enters your own sign today at 11 degrees, a homecoming that follows two days of lighter Libra energy and brings you back into your native emotional depth, right as the First Quarter phase reaches 60 percent illumination and demands action. This is your house of self and identity, and the pairing of your ruling Moon phase with your own sign creates unusual momentum toward a decision about who you are choosing to be next. Pluto, your other ruler, continues retrograde through Aquarius in your fourth house, deepening a slower reconstruction of your foundations that runs beneath today's more immediate pull toward action.
scorpion.love: You feel everything more acutely today, and a partner will likely sense it even if you say little. This is a good day to let your intensity show rather than managing it away; authenticity serves you better than restraint right now.
scorpion.work: A professional decision that has been circling for days reaches its moment today. The First Quarter energy combined with your own sign's Moon gives you real momentum; use it rather than second-guessing it further.
scorpion.energy: This is your most naturally powerful lunar placement, water meeting water, depth meeting depth. Physical intensity, whether through movement or focused work, channels this well.
scorpion.intuition: Your intuition operates at full strength today, sharper and more immediate than in recent days. Whatever you sense about a person or situation right now is worth trusting without much second-guessing.
scorpion.mantra: I trust the full depth of what I feel today.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Moon moves into Scorpio at 11 degrees in your twelfth house, a marked change from the more sociable Libra placement of recent days into something private, hidden, and considerably more introspective. The First Quarter phase usually calls for outward action, but here in your house of solitude and the unconscious, the action required is internal, a decision about what you are ready to finally confront. Neptune retrograde continues moving through your own sign, softening your usual directness with a haze that asks for patience rather than your typical forward charge.
sagittaire.love: Feelings you have kept private may surface today, whether your own or a partner's. This is not a day for grand gestures but for quiet, honest acknowledgment of something felt rather than said.
sagittaire.work: Behind-the-scenes work, research, or reflection on a project's true direction serves you better today than any public push. Trust that this quieter contribution matters as much as your usual visible momentum.
sagittaire.energy: Your fire is banked low today, turned inward rather than outward, and that is not a loss of power but a different use of it. Rest and solitude restore you more than activity would.
sagittaire.intuition: The twelfth house Scorpio Moon deepens access to what you usually keep beneath conscious awareness. A dream or a sudden inward realization carries real information today.
sagittaire.mantra: I honor what surfaces from my own depths.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Moon enters Scorpio at 11 degrees in your eleventh house, a shift from the lighter Libra energy of recent days into something more intense around friendships, community, and long-term aspirations. The First Quarter phase asks you to act on a decision about where you truly belong, rather than continuing to weigh it abstractly. Saturn, your ruler, works quietly in the background today as this Scorpio Moon brings unusual emotional weight to a group dynamic or a shared goal you have not fully examined.
capricorne.love: A friendship that overlaps with romance, or a partner's role within your wider social world, asks for honest evaluation today. What looks supportive on the surface may need a deeper look.
capricorne.work: A collective project or professional network reaches a point where its actual value must be assessed rather than assumed. Trust your instinct if something no longer serves the goal it was meant to serve.
capricorne.energy: Your usual disciplined steadiness meets Scorpio's demand for emotional honesty today, and the two can work together if you allow feeling to inform structure rather than resisting it.
capricorne.intuition: Your read on a group's true dynamics, and on who genuinely supports your long-term goals, is sharp today. Trust the quiet doubt more than the loud reassurance.
capricorne.mantra: I choose the community that truly serves my future.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon enters Scorpio at 11 degrees in your tenth house, a considerably heavier and more searching placement than the airy Libra Moon of recent days, landing squarely on your career and public reputation. The First Quarter phase demands a real decision here, not further deliberation, just as Pluto retrograde continues its slow work through your own sign, deepening an internal restructuring that this Moon now pushes into visible, professional territory. What you decide today about your direction carries more weight than it might on an ordinary Wednesday.
verseau.love: A partner may notice you are more focused on ambition than affection today, and naming that honestly serves the relationship better than pretending otherwise. Balance is possible once the imbalance is acknowledged.
verseau.work: A career decision that has been building for some time reaches a genuine turning point today. The Scorpio Moon favors depth and commitment over keeping your options open; choose the direction that feels most true, even if it demands more of you.
verseau.energy: Your usual detachment meets an unfamiliar intensity today, less about ideas and more about visceral drive. Let it fuel one significant push rather than dispersing it into scattered activity.
verseau.intuition: Your sense of your true professional direction, beneath the noise of expectation, is unusually clear today. Trust the pull toward what feels authentically yours.
verseau.mantra: I commit to the direction that is truly mine.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Moon moves into Scorpio at 11 degrees in your ninth house, a deeper and more searching placement than the recent Libra Moon, turning your attention toward belief, meaning, and the larger questions that daily life often crowds out. The First Quarter phase, at 60 percent illumination, asks for a decision about what you actually believe rather than more open-ended wondering. Neptune retrograde, your own ruler, continues through Aries in your second house, quietly reshaping your relationship to security and self-worth beneath this more outward-facing lunar activity.
poissons.love: A shared belief or a difference in worldview with a partner surfaces today in a way that asks for honest conversation rather than gentle avoidance. Real connection deepens when you can disagree and remain close.
poissons.work: A long-term plan or a philosophy underlying your work benefits from real reconsideration today, not just refinement at the surface. Trust your instinct if something needs to be rebuilt rather than merely adjusted.
poissons.energy: Water meets water again today in an unusually intense combination, deepening your natural sensitivity into something almost overwhelming if unmanaged. Ground yourself through simple physical ritual before making any major decision.
poissons.intuition: Your intuition about the deeper truth of a belief, a plan, or a teacher's guidance is unusually sharp today. Trust the certainty that arrives without needing to explain itself.
poissons.mantra: I trust the truth that needs no explanation.
poissons.author: Sibylle
